sentences.arabic: رَكِبَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ الْحَافِلَةَ إِلَى وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je sjela u autobus do centra grada.
sentences.translationEn: The family took the bus to the city center.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْحَافِلَةُ مَلِيئَةً بِالنَّاسِ وَلَكِنَّهَا مَرِيحَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Autobus je bio pun ljudi ali udoban.
sentences.translationEn: The bus was full of people but comfortable.

sentences.arabic: نَزَلُوا أَمَامَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْكَبِيرِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Izašli su ispred velike džamije u centru.
sentences.translationEn: They got off in front of the big mosque in the city center.

sentences.arabic: مَشَوْا فِي الشَّوَارِعِ وَنَظَرُوا إِلَى الْمَحَلَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Šetali su ulicama i gledali u prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: They walked through the streets and looked at the shops.
